debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
inst✝ : UnitalFreeStateTheory ι
i : ι
ρ : MState (H i)
ε : Prob
hε : 0 < ε ∧ ε < 1
σ : (n : ℕ) → ↑IsFree
ε' : Prob
hε'₁ : 0 < ε'
hε'₂ : ε' < ε
hR1R2 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ
hR1 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε ≠ ⊤
hR2 : @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ ≠ ⊤
ε₀ : ℝ := (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ - @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε).toReal * (↑ε - ↑ε') / (1 - ↑ε)
hε₀ : 0 < ε₀
hε₀' : ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) ≤ ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀
m : ℕ
hm : m ≥ 1 ∧ 𝐃(statePow ρ m‖↑(σ m)) / ↑m < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ + ↑⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩
σ₁ : MState (H i)
hσ₁_pos : σ₁.m.PosDef
hσ₁_free : IsFree σ₁
«σ̃» : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => @SteinsLemma.Lemma6_σn ι inst✝ i m σ₁ (↑(σ m)) n
σ_max_exists : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ x ∈ IsFree, IsMaxOn (fun σ => OptimalHypothesisRate (statePow ρ n) ε {σ}) IsFree x
«σ⋆» : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => Classical.choose ⋯
σ' : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => ⟨2 / 3, ⋯⟩[⟨1 / 2, ⋯⟩[«σ̃» n↔«σ⋆» n]↔statePow σ₁ n]
σ'_free : ∀ (n : ℕ), IsFree (σ' n)
σ'_posdef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (σ' n).m.PosDef
mineig : ℝ := ⨅ i_1, ⋯.eigenvalues i_1
h_min_pos : 0 < mineig
h_min_le_one : mineig ≤ 1
c : ℕ → ℝ := fun n => Real.log (1 / mineig) + Real.log 3 / ↑(max n 1)
hc : ∀ (n : ℕ), 0 < c n
hc_lim : Filter.Tendsto (fun n => c n / ↑n) Filter.atTop (nhds 0)
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ := fun n lam => ↑⌈Real.log lam / c n⌉ * c n
h_le_f : ∀ (n : ℕ) (lam : ℝ), Real.log lam ≤ f n lam
h_f_le : ∀ (n : ℕ) (lam : ℝ), f n lam < Real.log lam + c n
σ''_unnormalized : (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := fun n => (↑(σ' n)).cfc fun e => Real.exp (f n e)
σ''_unnormalized_PosDef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (↑(σ''_unnormalized n)).PosDef
h_exp_f : ∀ (n : ℕ) (x : ℝ), 0 < x → x ≤ Real.exp (f n x) ∧ Real.exp (f n x) < Real.exp (c n) * x
σ''_tr_bounds : ∀ (n : ℕ), 1 ≤ (σ''_unnormalized n).trace ∧ (σ''_unnormalized n).trace < Real.exp (c n)
σ'' : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) :=
  fun n => { M := (σ''_unnormalized n).trace⁻¹ • σ''_unnormalized n, zero_le := ⋯, tr := ⋯ }
σ''_posdef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (↑↑(σ'' n)).PosDef
σ'_le_σ'' : ∀ (n : ℕ), Real.exp (-c n) • ↑(σ' n) ≤ ↑(σ'' n)
σ''_le_σ' : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≤ Real.exp (c n) • ↑(σ' n)
ℰ : (n : ℕ) → CPTPMap (H (i ^ n)) (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := fun n => pinching_map (σ'' n)
hσ'n_eq_sum_third : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ' n) = (1 / 3) • ↑(«σ̃» n) + (1 / 3) • ↑(«σ⋆» n) + (1 / 3) • ↑(statePow σ₁ n)
hσ₁_le_σ' : ∀ (n : ℕ), (1 / 3) • ↑(statePow σ₁ n) ≤ ↑(σ' n)
hliminf :
  Filter.liminf (fun n => 𝐃(statePow ρ n‖σ' n) / ↑n) Filter.atTop =
    Filter.liminf (fun n => 𝐃((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)‖σ'' n) / ↑n) Filter.atTop
«hσ''_ge_σ⋆» : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≥ (Real.exp (-c n) / 3) • ↑(«σ⋆» n)
«hσ''_ge_σ̃» : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≥ (Real.exp (-c n) / 3) • ↑(«σ̃» n)
hσ''_ge_σ₁ : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≥ (Real.exp (-c n) / 3) • ↑(statePow σ₁ n)
hc_littleO : (fun n => c n + Real.log 3) =o[Filter.atTop] fun x => ↑x
hliminf_le :
  Filter.liminf (fun n => (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) ε {σ'' n}).negLog / ↑n) Filter.atTop ≤
    ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε))
hlimsup_le :
  ∀ (ε1 : Prob),
    0 < ↑ε1 ∧ ↑ε1 < 1 →
      Filter.limsup (fun n => (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) (1 - ε1) {σ'' n}).negLog / ↑n)
          Filter.atTop ≤
        ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩)
P1 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ :=
  fun ε2 n =>
    (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n)).proj_le ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))
P2 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ :=
  fun ε2 n =>
    (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n)).proj_le
      ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))
hPcomm : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Commute ↑(P1 ε2 n) ↑(P2 ε2 n)
hliminfP1 :
  ∀ (ε2 : NNReal),
    0 < ε2 → Filter.liminf (fun n => (P1 (↑ε2) n).inner ↑((fun n => (ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) n)) Filter.atTop ≤ 1 - ↑ε
hlimsupP2 :
  ∀ (ε2 : NNReal),
    0 < ε2 →
      ∀ (ε1 : Prob),
        0 < ↑ε1 ∧ ↑ε1 < 1 →
          Filter.limsup
              (fun n =>
                ((Real.exp (↑n * (↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩) + ↑ε2)) •
                          ↑(σ'' n)).proj_le
                      ↑((fun n => (ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) n)).inner
                  ↑((fun n => (ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) n))
              Filter.atTop ≤
            1 - ↑(1 - ε1)
hlimsupP2' : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ), 0 < ε2 → Filter.limsup (fun n => (P2 ε2 n).inner ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))) Filter.atTop = 0
E1 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := 1 - P1
E2 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := P1 - P2
E3 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := P2
Esum : E1 + E2 + E3 = 1
hE1proj :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    E1 ε2 n =
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).proj_lt
        (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n))
hE2leProj :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    E2 ε2 n ≤
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).proj_lt
        (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n))
hE1leq :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    0 < ε2 →
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).inner
          (@SteinsLemma.HermitianMat.mul_commute (H (i ^ n)) (FinH (i ^ n)) ((1 / ↑n) • E1 ε2 n)
            ((↑((pinching_map (σ'' n)) (statePow ρ n))).log - (↑(σ'' n)).log)
            (@SteinsLemma.commute_aux✝ (H (i ^ n)) (FinH (i ^ n)) (DecEqH (i ^ n)) n
              (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2) (E1 ε2 n) ↑((pinching_map (σ'' n)) (statePow ρ n))
              ↑(σ'' n) ⋯ ⋯)) ≤
        (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).inner ((ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝¹ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2) • E1 ε2 n)
hE2leq :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    0 < ε2 →
      (1 / ↑n) • ↑(E2 ε2 n) * (↑(↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).log - ↑(↑(σ'' n)).log) ≤
        (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2) • ↑(E2 ε2 n)
c' : ℝ → ℕ → ℝ := fun ε2 n => max (c n + c n / ↑n) (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)
hc' : ∀ (ε2 : ℕ → NNReal), (∀ (n : ℕ), ε2 n < 1) → ∃ C, ∀ᶠ (n : ℕ) in Filter.atTop, c' (↑(ε2 n)) n ≤ ↑C
hσ'' : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Real.exp (-↑n * c' ε2 n) • 1 ≤ ↑(σ'' n)
ε2✝ : ℝ
n✝ : ℕ
ε2 : ℝ
n : ℕ
hε2 : 0 < ε2
hlog : 0 ≤ ↑(↑(σ'' n)).log - ↑(Real.exp (-(↑n * c' ε2 n)) • 1).log
⊢ Commute (↑(E3 ε2 n)) (↑(↑(σ'' n)).log - ↑(Real.exp (-(↑n * c' ε2 n)) • 1).log)

failed_attempts:
have hcomm := hPcomm ε2 n
              dsimp [E3, P2] at hcomm
              simpa [HermitianMat.val_eq_coe, MState.toMat_M] using hcomm

dsimp [E3]
              simpa using hPcomm ε2 n

dsimp [E3]
              have hP2 : (E3 ε2 n).toMat = (P2 ε2 n).toMat := by rfl
              rw [hP2]
              simpa [P2] using (hPcomm ε2 n).sub_right (Commute.refl _)

subst E3 P2
              simp only [HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
              apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
              · apply HermitianMat.H
              simp only [AddSubgroupClass.coe_sub, MState.toMat_M, selfAdjoint.val_smul]
              exact (pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n))

have hcomm : Commute (P1 ε2 n).toMat (P2 ε2 n).toMat := by
                simpa [E3, P2] using hPcomm ε2 n
              have hproj : E3 ε2 n = P2 ε2 n := by
                rfl
              subst hproj
              have hcomm' : Commute (P2 ε2 n).toMat ((σ'' n).M.toMat) := by
                -- `P2` is a CFC of `((ℰ n (ρ⊗^S[n])).M - ...)`, hence commutes with `σ'' n`
                simp [P2, HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
              have hcomm_log : Commute (P2 ε2 n).toMat (σ'' n).M.log.toMat := by
                simpa [HermitianMat.log] using hcomm'.cfc_right (f := Real.log)
              have hcomm_log' :
                  Commute (P2 ε2 n).toMat
                    (Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).log.toMat := by
                -- scalar multiple of identity commutes with everything
                simpa [HermitianMat.log] using (Commute.smul_right (Commute.one_right (P2 ε2 n).toMat) _).cfc_right
                  (f := Real.log)
              exact hcomm_log.sub_right hcomm_log'

dsimp [E3, P2]
              simp only [HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
              apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
              · apply HermitianMat.H
              simp only [AddSubgroupClass.coe_sub]
              have h : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m (σ'' n).m := pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
              have h' : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m ((Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat _ ℂ)).toMat) := by
                simpa using (Commute.smul_right (Commute.one_right ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m) _) 
              exact h.sub_right (h'.sub_left (Commute.refl _))
simpa [E3, P2] using hPcomm ε2 n

have hcomm : Commute ((P2 ε2 n).toMat) ((ℰ n (ρ⊗^S[n])).M.log.toMat - (σ'' n).M.log.toMat) := by
                simp only [P2, HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                simp only [AddSubgroupClass.coe_sub, MState.toMat_M, selfAdjoint.val_smul]
                suffices h : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m (σ'' n).m by
                  apply Commute.sub_left
                  · exact (Commute.refl _).sub_right (h.smul_right _)
                  · exact (h.symm.sub_right ((Commute.refl _).smul_right _)).smul_left _
                exact pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
              have hcomm' : Commute ((P2 ε2 n).toMat) ((σ'' n).M.log.toMat - (Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • 1 : HermitianMat _ ℂ).log.toMat) := by
                have hlogcomm : Commute ((P2 ε2 n).toMat) ((σ'' n).M.log.toMat) := by
                  simpa [P2, HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat] using
                    (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (A := ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).M) (B := (Real.exp (↑n * ((R2 ρ σ).toReal + ε₀ + ε2)) • (σ'' n).M)) (f := fun x ↦ if x ≤ 0 then (0 : ℝ) else 1)
                        (by apply HermitianMat.H) (by
                          simpa only [MState.toMat_M, selfAdjoint.val_smul] using (HermitianMat.H (Real.exp (↑n * ((R2 ρ σ).toReal + ε₀ + ε2)) • (σ'' n).M))))
                have hlogcomm2 : Commute ((P2 ε2 n).toMat) ((Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • 1 : HermitianMat _ ℂ).log.toMat) := by
                  have : Commute ((P2 ε2 n).toMat) ((Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).toMat) := by
                    simpa [P2, HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat] using
                      (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (A := ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).M) (B := (Real.exp (↑n * ((R2 ρ σ).toReal + ε₀ + ε2)) • (σ'' n).M)) (f := fun x ↦ if x ≤ 0 then (0 : ℝ) else 1)
                        (by apply HermitianMat.H) (by
                          simpa only [MState.toMat_M, selfAdjoint.val_smul] using (HermitianMat.H (Real.exp (↑n * ((R2 ρ σ).toReal + ε₀ + ε2)) • (σ'' n).M))))
                  exact this.log_right (by
                    simpa using (Matrix.PosDef.smul Matrix.PosDef.one (Real.exp_pos (-(n * c' ε2 n)))))
                exact hlogcomm.sub_right hlogcomm2
              simpa [E3, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using hcomm'

dsimp [E3, P2]
              simp only [HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
              apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
              · apply HermitianMat.H
              simp only [AddSubgroupClass.coe_sub, MState.toMat_M, selfAdjoint.val_smul]
              exact (pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)).log.sub_left

have hE3 : E3 ε2 n = P2 ε2 n := rfl
              have hP2 : P2 ε2 n = (Real.exp (↑n * ((R2 ρ σ).toReal + ε₀ + ε2)) • (σ'' n).M).proj_le ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).M := rfl
              subst hE3
              -- `proj_le` is a CFC of its argument, and the log-difference is also a CFC of the same argument
              -- since both `ℰ n (ρ⊗^S[n])` and `σ'' n` commute.
              have h_comm : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m (σ'' n).m := by
                exact pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
              have h_comm_logs : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m ((σ'' n).M.log.toMat - (Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • 1 : HermitianMat _ ℂ).log.toMat) := by
                have h1 : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m (σ'' n).m := h_comm
                have h2 :
                    Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m
                      ((Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • 1 : HermitianMat _ ℂ).toMat) := by
                  simpa using (Commute.smul_right (Commute.one_right ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m) (Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n))))
                have hlog1 : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m (σ'' n).M.log.toMat :=
                  (HermitianMat.commute_toMat_log_iff).2 h1
                have hlog2 :
                    Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m
                      ( (Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • 1 : HermitianMat _ ℂ).log.toMat ) :=
                  (HermitianMat.commute_toMat_log_iff).2 h2
                exact hlog1.sub_right hlog2
              have h_proj_comm :
                  Commute (P2 ε2 n).toMat ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m := by
                simp [P2, HermitianMat.proj_le]
              exact h_proj_comm.left_comm h_comm_logs

dsimp [E3, P2]
              rw [HermitianMat.proj_le]
              apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
              · apply HermitianMat.H
              simp

dsimp [E3, P2]
              simp only [HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
              apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
              · apply HermitianMat.H
              simp only [AddSubgroupClass.coe_sub, MState.toMat_M, selfAdjoint.val_smul]
              exact Commute.sub_left (pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)).log_left
                (Commute.smul_right (Commute.one_left _) _)

have hcomm : Commute (P1 ε2 n).toMat (P2 ε2 n).toMat := hPcomm ε2 n
              have hcomm' : Commute (P2 ε2 n).toMat (P1 ε2 n).toMat := hcomm.symm
              refine hcomm'.sub_left ?_
              exact (Commute.refl _).sub_right (Commute.refl _)

simpa [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat] using
                (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (a := (E3 ε2 n).toMat) (b := ((σ'' n).M.log.toMat - (Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • 1 : HermitianMat _ ℂ).log.toMat))
                  (by
                    apply HermitianMat.H)
                  (by
                    simpa using
                      (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                        (a := ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m)
                        (b := (σ'' n).m)
                        (by
                          apply (ℰ n (ρ⊗^S[n])).M.H)
                        (by
                          exact (pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)))) )

dsimp [E3]
              simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
                (hPcomm ε2 n).commute_cfc_left (f := fun x ↦ x) (g := fun x ↦ x)

subst E3
              exact (hPcomm ε2 n).sub_right (Commute.refl _)

dsimp [E3, P2]
              simpa using (hPcomm ε2 n).symm
simpa [E3] using (hPcomm ε2 n).sub_right (Commute.refl _)

dsimp [E3, P2]
              simp only [HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
              apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
              · apply HermitianMat.H
              simp only [AddSubgroupClass.coe_sub, MState.toMat_M, selfAdjoint.val_smul]
              apply Commute.sub_left
              · exact (Commute.refl _).sub_right ((pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)).smul_right _)
              · exact ((pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)).symm.sub_right ((Commute.refl _).smul_right _)).smul_left _

simpa [E3, P2, HermitianMat.proj_le] using
                (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (a := ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))) (b := (Real.exp (↑n * ((R2 ρ σ).toReal + ε₀ + ε2)) • (σ'' n).M : HermitianMat _ ℂ)))).symm

have hcomm₁ : Commute (P1 ε2 n).toMat (P2 ε2 n).toMat := hPcomm ε2 n
              have hcomm₂ : Commute (P2 ε2 n).toMat (P1 ε2 n).toMat := hcomm₁.symm
              have hcomm : Commute (P2 ε2 n).toMat (P1 ε2 n - P2 ε2 n).toMat :=
                hcomm₂.sub_right (Commute.refl _)
              simpa [E3, E2, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using hcomm

have hcomm : Commute (P1 ε2 n).toMat (P2 ε2 n).toMat := hPcomm ε2 n
              dsimp [E3, E1, E2, E3] at hcomm ⊢
              simpa [P2] using (hcomm.sub_right (Commute.refl _))

classical
              refine (hPcomm ε2 n).sub_right ?_
              have hcomm : Commute ((Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).toMat) ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).M.toMat :=
                (Commute.smul_left (Commute.one_left _) _).symm
              exact (hcomm.log_left (Matrix.PosDef.smul Matrix.PosDef.one (Real.exp_pos (-(n * c' ε2 n)))))

have hcomm : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m (σ'' n).m := pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
              have hcomm' :
                  Commute ((Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).toMat) (σ'' n).M.toMat :=
                Commute.smul_left (Commute.one_left (σ'' n).M.toMat) (Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)))
              have hcomm_log :
                  Commute ((σ'' n).M.log.toMat) ((Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).log.toMat) := by
                exact IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (A := (σ'' n).M) (B := (Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)))
                  (by simpa using hcomm'.symm)
              have hcomm_proj :
                  Commute ((E3 ε2 n).toMat) ((σ'' n).M.toMat) := by
                have : Commute ((P2 ε2 n).toMat) ((σ'' n).M.toMat) := by
                  dsimp [E3, P2]
                  simpa using (hcomm.smul_right (Real.exp (↑n * ((R2 ρ σ).toReal + ε₀ + ε2)))).proj_le_left
                simpa [E3] using this
              have hcomm_log' : Commute (E3 ε2 n).toMat ((σ'' n).M.log.toMat) := by
                exact IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (A := (E3 ε2 n)) (B := (σ'' n).M) (by simpa using hcomm_proj.symm)
              have hcomm_log'' :
                  Commute (E3 ε2 n).toMat ((Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).log.toMat) := by
                have hcomm_one : Commute (E3 ε2 n).toMat ((Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).toMat) := by
                  simpa using Commute.one_right (E3 ε2 n).toMat
                exact IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (A := (E3 ε2 n))
                  (B := (Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ))) (by simpa using hcomm_one.symm)
              exact (hcomm_log'.sub_right hcomm_log'').sub_right (Commute.refl _)

dsimp [E3, P2]
              simp only [HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
              refine (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc ?_).sub_right ?_
              · apply HermitianMat.H
              · have hcomm : Commute ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)).m (σ'' n).m :=
                  pinching_commutes (statePow ρ n) (σ'' n)
                have hcomm' :
                    Commute ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)).m
                      ((Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).toMat) := by
                  simpa using (Commute.smul_right (Commute.one_right ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)).m) _) _
                exact (hcomm.sub_right (hcomm'.symm)).log_left

dsimp [E3, P2]
              simp only [HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat]
              apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
              · apply HermitianMat.H
              · symm
                apply IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc
                · apply HermitianMat.H
                simp only [AddSubgroupClass.coe_sub, MState.toMat_M, selfAdjoint.val_smul]
                exact pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)

have hcomm1 : Commute (P2 ε2 n).toMat ((ℰ n (ρ⊗^S[n])).M.log.toMat - (σ'' n).M.log.toMat) := by
                have hcomm : Commute ((ℰ n (ρ⊗^S[n])).M.toMat) ((σ'' n).M.toMat) := pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
                have hcomm_log : Commute ((ℰ n (ρ⊗^S[n])).M.log.toMat) ((σ'' n).M.log.toMat) :=
                  (hcomm.isSelfAdjoint_left (HermitianMat.H _)).log_left.log_right
                have hcomm2 : Commute ((Real.exp (↑n * ((R2 ρ σ).toReal + ε₀ + ε2)) • (σ'' n).M).toMat)
                                      ((ℰ n (ρ⊗^S[n])).M.log.toMat - (σ'' n).M.log.toMat) := by
                  have : Commute (σ'' n).M.toMat ((ℰ n (ρ⊗^S[n])).M.log.toMat - (σ'' n).M.log.toMat) :=
                    (hcomm_log.symm.sub_right (Commute.refl _)).symm
                  simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using
                    (this.smul_left (Real.exp (↑n * ((R2 ρ σ).toReal + ε₀ + ε2))))
                simpa [P2, HermitianMat.proj_le, HermitianMat.cfc_toMat] using
                  (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (A := (ℰ n (ρ⊗^S[n])).M.log.toMat - (σ'' n).M.log.toMat)
                    (by
                      simp [sub_eq_add_neg]
                      exact (HermitianMat.H _).sub (HermitianMat.H _))
                    (hcomm2.symm)).symm
              have hcomm_const : Commute (P2 ε2 n).toMat (-(Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).log.toMat) := by
                simpa [E3, P2] using (Commute.refl (P2 ε2 n).toMat).neg_right
              simpa [E3, E2, E1, P1, P2, HermitianMat.log, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm] using
                (hcomm1.sub_right hcomm_const)

have hcomm : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m (σ'' n).m := pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)
              have hcomm' : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m (Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).toMat :=
                Commute.smul_right (Commute.one_right _) _
              have hcommLog : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m ((σ'' n).M.log.toMat - (Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).log.toMat) := by
                have h1 : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m (σ'' n).M.log.toMat := by
                  simpa [HermitianMat.log] using IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.H _) hcomm
                have h2 : Commute ((ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).m (Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).log.toMat := by
                  simpa [HermitianMat.log] using IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.H _) hcomm'
                exact h1.sub_right h2
              dsimp [E3, P2]
              simpa using (IsSelfAdjoint.commute_cfc (HermitianMat.H _) hcommLog).symm

have h1 : Commute (E3 ε2 n).toMat (ℰ n (ρ⊗^S[n])).M.toMat := by
                dsimp [E3, P2, ℰ]
                simpa using (HermitianMat.commute_proj_le_left
                  (A := (Real.exp (↑n * ((R2 ρ σ).toReal + ε₀ + ε2)) • (σ'' n).M))
                  (B := (pinching_map (σ'' n)) (ρ⊗^S[n])).M)
              have h2 : Commute (E3 ε2 n).toMat (σ'' n).M.toMat := by
                dsimp [E3, P2]
                simpa using (HermitianMat.commute_proj_le_left
                  (A := (Real.exp (↑n * ((R2 ρ σ).toReal + ε₀ + ε2)) • (σ'' n).M))
                  (B := (ℰ n) (ρ⊗^S[n])).M).trans (pinching_commutes (ρ⊗^S[n]) (σ'' n)).symm
              have h3 : Commute (E3 ε2 n).toMat ((Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).toMat) :=
                (Commute.one_right _).smul_right _
              have h4 : Commute (E3 ε2 n).toMat (σ'' n).M.log.toMat :=
                (h2.cfc_right _)
              have h5 : Commute (E3 ε2 n).toMat ((Real.exp (-(n * c' ε2 n)) • (1 : HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ)).log.toMat) :=
                (h3.cfc_right _)
              simpa [HermitianMat.log, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using h4.sub_left h5
